body: I have also added a prescribed ocean, so we have a completely prescribed earth model, where the only computation required are the fluxes
title: An experiment to compute flux climatology

body:
Since the interface changed a bit it is easier to rewrite the PR rather than fix #322, since the changes are minimal. This PR supersedes #322 but has the same goal. 

closes #322
title: Allow attaching a prognostic atmosphere take 2
